meaning: n.[矿]祖母绿,翡翠,绿宝石,翠绿色adj.翡翠的,翠绿色的
examples: One time in Brooklyn, I found an emerald ring in my cab.
She told the artist, "Paint me with diamond earrings, a diamond necklace, emerald bracelets, and a ruby pendant."
Lofty palm trees and emerald tropical plants dot the sidewalks and the charming plazas.
There, thick emerald forests give way to wild grasslands reminiscent of the African savannah.
There are wild parks and preserves, and emerald coves to explore by hired boat.
